svg.title: AI-native pipeline with every agent tied to a file in the harness repo
svg.desc: A full multi-agent pipeline where each agent is annotated with the specific repo files it reads (guides) or writes to (sensors). The bottom of the diagram shows the actual harness repo structure, and dashed lines connect each agent to the files it uses, making the tie between the pipeline and the harness explicit.
svg.text: State shared continuously — spec edits reach build and test in real time

g.text: Reviews synthesized report from all three agents
writes: new linter, new eval case,
new ADR — back into the harness

svg.text: Every incident compounds the harness — new sensors, new guides, new evals added permanently

g.text: The harness — what every agent above reads from and writes to
Root guide every agent reads first
Modular capabilities: add-feature, fix-bug, update-docs, write-test
Structured specs the design and build agents execute against
Invariants, ADRs — what compliance and review agents enforce
Where the test and critic agents live; drives the eval gate
Linters, drift detectors — the deterministic review layer
Trace and log schemas — what monitoring and incident agents read
CI pipelines — where CI/CD and release agents run
